import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut sign = 1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if has_digit
        result = list.push(result, current * sign)
        current = 0
        has_digit = false
        sign = 1
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
    else
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    result = list.push(result, current * sign)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_line(line1)
let ys = parse_line(line2)
let n = xs.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let x = match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let y = match ys.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let s = x + y
  println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
  i = i + 1
end
